decision_summary: Approve v9.2 as a production-boundary candidate only; production execution remains unauthorized.
rationale: The artifact/audit pair checks the exact pre-production boundaries and rejects overclaims.
recommendation: Proceed to release validation after provider-production-boundary-audit, product-value-evidence-audit, release-state-audit, npm test, and smoke are green.
artifact_change_recommendations: Add provider-production-boundary record/audit and Mission Control projection.
organization_change_recommendations: Keep production go/no-go as a human-controlled gate.
